Name: Space Namer Lite
Author: CheersYan

Actions.Name: Desktop 1
Actions.Tooltip: Tap to switch to desktop slot 1 using macOS Control-Arrow navigation. Hold for a moment to rename it for this macOS boot session.

Actions.Name: Current Desktop
Actions.Tooltip: Show the plugin's current desktop estimate without switching Spaces.

Actions.Name: Name Desktops
Actions.Tooltip: Prompt for temporary session names for every detected desktop.

Actions.Name: Refresh Spaces
Actions.Tooltip: Refresh the detected macOS desktop list from the native Spaces plist.

Description: Session-only labels and desktop switching for macOS Spaces with no external Spaces backend dependency.
